Layout.title: Guy Tzruya — Architecture & Interior Design
Layout.description: Architecture, interior design, and licensing in Israel. Guy Tzruya studio — professional spaces tailored to you.

BuildingLicensing.heroSubtitle: Professional architectural planning, permit drawings, and authority submissions — from first concept through building approval.

process.title: Our work process
process.subtitle: From initial planning through authority approval — precise, transparent, professional guidance at every stage.
process.ctaLead: Ready to get started? We would be glad to support you from day one.

1.title: Initial consultation & project briefing
1.description: Define goals, constraints, timelines, and budget — and establish a clear plan for what comes next.

2.title: Existing conditions survey & initial planning
2.description: Review current conditions, authority requirements, and constraints — and shape an initial planning direction.

3.title: Architectural plans & supporting documents
3.description: Prepare plans, sections, and required documents according to authority and project requirements.

4.title: Authority submission & comment handling
4.description: Submit the file, address comments, and make revisions until all requirements are met.

5.title: Permit / building approvals
5.description: Guide the process through to the building permits and approvals required for execution.

6.title: Final approval & handover for execution
6.description: Complete the regulatory process and deliver a plan package ready for on-site execution. Scope can be extended to execution plans and site supervision.

BuildingLicensing.faqLead: Practical information on building planning and licensing — so you know what to expect at each stage.

scope.question: What does building planning and licensing include?
scope.answer: The service covers project assessment, architectural drawings, supporting documents, authority submission, and handling comments — through building approval and permits. We guide you through the full planning and regulatory process.

timeline.question: How long does the licensing process take?
timeline.answer: Duration depends on project type, local authority, and plan complexity. After an initial briefing we can give a realistic timeline — typically several months.

authority.question: Do you liaise with the authority and handle comments?
authority.answer: Yes. We submit the file, track review status, address comments, and make required revisions until requirements are met — saving you time and miscommunication with officials.

documents.question: Which documents and drawings are required for approval?
documents.answer: Requirements vary by project type and authority. Usually architectural plans, sections, technical appendices, and ownership documents are needed — we prepare a tailored checklist and help complete the package.

changeOfUse.question: Can you plan an extension or updates to an existing building?
changeOfUse.answer: In many cases, yes. Extensions and updates require checking rights, zoning, and authority requirements. In the first consultation we review constraints and options before planning begins.

start.question: How do we get started?
start.answer: Start with a short consultation: define goals, scope, and timeline. Then we build a work plan, survey existing conditions, and move to initial design — reach out using the button below.

BuildingLicensing.ctaLead: We would be glad to support your building planning and licensing — or follow us on social media for updates and inspiration.

BusinessLicensing.heroSubtitle: Professional architectural planning, permit drawings, and authority submissions — from first concept through final approvals for your business.

process.title: Our work process
process.subtitle: From initial planning through authority approval — professional, precise guidance for business licensing at every stage.
process.ctaLead: Ready to move forward with licensing? We would be glad to support you from day one.

1.title: Initial consultation & business briefing
1.description: Define business goals, operational needs, timelines, and budget to build a clear work plan.

2.title: Existing conditions, rights & uses survey
2.description: Review on-site conditions, use compliance, and planning requirements with the local authority.

3.title: Licensing plans & documents
3.description: Prepare architectural plans, appendices, and supporting documents according to business type and authority requirements.

4.title: Authority submission & comment handling
4.description: Submit the file, support professional review, and make revisions until all requirements are met.

5.title: Permit / business approvals
5.description: Guide the process through to the permits and approvals required for lawful business operation.

6.title: Final approval & handover
6.description: Complete the regulatory process and deliver a document and plan package ready for execution. Scope can be extended to execution plans and site supervision.

BusinessLicensing.faqLead: Practical information on business planning and licensing — so you know what to expect at each stage.

scope.question: What does planning and licensing for businesses include?
scope.answer: The service covers needs assessment, architectural drawings, supporting documents, authority submission, and handling comments — through building approvals and permits. We guide you through the full bureaucratic and planning process.

timeline.question: How long does the licensing process take?
timeline.answer: Duration depends on project type, local authority, and plan complexity. After an initial briefing we can give a realistic timeline — typically several months rather than weeks.

authority.question: Do you liaise with the authority and handle comments?
authority.answer: Yes. We submit the file, track review status, address comments, and make required revisions until requirements are met — saving you time and miscommunication with officials.

documents.question: Which documents and drawings are required?
documents.answer: Requirements vary by business type, building, and authority. Usually architectural plans, sections, technical appendices, and ownership documents are needed — we prepare a tailored checklist and help complete the package.

changeOfUse.question: Can you plan a change of use or business expansion?
changeOfUse.answer: Often yes — change of use, expansion, or adapting an existing space requires checking rights, zoning, and authority rules. In the first consultation we assess options and limits before planning begins.

start.question: How do we get started?
start.answer: Start with a short consultation: define goals, scope, and timeline. Then we build a work plan, survey existing conditions, and move to initial design — reach out using the button below.

BusinessLicensing.ctaLead: We would be glad to support your business planning and licensing — or follow us on social media for updates and inspiration.

InteriorDesign.heroSubtitle: Interior planning and design for homes, apartments, offices and businesses — with precise attention to every detail, from concept through execution.

process.title: Our work process
process.subtitle: From initial planning through a finished space — full, precise, meticulous guidance at every stage.

1.title: Needs & budget briefing
1.description: Define goals, lifestyle, space constraints, and budget to establish a clear, actionable plan.

2.title: Design concept & mood boards
2.description: Shape a visual language, color palette, and core materials through sketches and inspiration boards.

3.title: Functional planning & zoning
3.description: Plan proper flow, area division, and comfortable daily function tailored to your needs.

4.title: Materials, colors & furniture selection
4.description: Choose pieces, finishes, and textures that balance aesthetics, durability, and maintenance.

5.title: Execution plans & supplier coordination
5.description: Prepare detailed plans and coordinate with trades and suppliers through to build start.

6.title: Styling, quality control & handover
6.description: Final styling, quality checks on every detail, and delivery of a complete, harmonious space.

modern-minimalist.title: Modern Minimalist Design
modern-minimalist.subtitle: Clean lines, open spaces, and natural light
modern-minimalist.description: Defined by straight, clean lines, bright open spaces, and materials such as glass and metal.

rustic-country.title: Rustic / Country Design
rustic-country.subtitle: Natural materials and a warm, homely atmosphere
rustic-country.description: Extensive use of natural materials like raw wood and stone to create a warm, inviting, homely feel.

organic-natural.title: Organic & Natural Design
organic-natural.subtitle: Biophilic design with calm and harmony
organic-natural.description: A strong 2026 trend focused on bringing nature indoors (Biophilic Design) for harmony and calm — rounded forms, natural textures, and greenery.

industrial.title: Industrial Design
industrial.subtitle: Concrete, exposed brick, and raw metal
industrial.description: Exposed structural elements such as pipes, brick walls, and raw concrete, paired with leather and metal furnishings.

high-tech-smart-home.title: High-Tech / Smart Home Design
high-tech-smart-home.subtitle: Smart technology in an elegant look
high-tech-smart-home.description: Advanced technology and smart systems woven into the space's aesthetics — luxurious, not laboratory-like.

modern-office.title: Modern Office Design
modern-office.subtitle: Flexible workspaces with a focus on well-being
modern-office.description: Flexible workspaces that encourage creativity and collaboration, with a strong emphasis on employee well-being.

InteriorDesign.simulationCtaTitle: Want to get a sense of how your home could look?
InteriorDesign.simulationCtaLead: Upload a photo, pick a style — and get a preview in minutes.
InteriorDesign.faqLead: Practical information on interior design — so you know what to expect at each stage.

scope.question: What does the interior design service include?
scope.answer: The service covers needs assessment, space planning, materials and finishes, execution drawings, furniture and lighting selection — and on-site support through completion. We guide you from concept to a finished space.

timeline.question: How long does an interior design project take?
timeline.answer: Duration depends on scope, property type, and design complexity. After an initial briefing we can give a realistic timeline — typically several months from planning through execution.

authority.question: Do you support execution and contractor supervision?
authority.answer: Yes. We support the build phase, check alignment with plans, handle site questions, and coordinate with contractors and suppliers — so the result matches the design.

documents.question: Do you help select materials, furniture, and lighting?
documents.answer: Yes. We guide choices for finishes, furniture, lighting, and accessories — aligned with your budget, style, and needs, with emphasis on quality and design consistency.

changeOfUse.question: Can you design an existing apartment or only a full renovation?
changeOfUse.answer: In many cases, yes — partial or full renovations, existing homes, or new properties are all possible. In the first consultation we review the current space, options, and the right scope for you.

start.question: How do we get started?
start.answer: Start with a short consultation: define goals, scope, and budget. Then we build a work plan, survey the space, and move to initial design — reach out using the button above.

Projects.heroSubtitle: Every project begins with listening, continues with precise planning, and ends in a space that feels right in every detail.
Projects.sliderAriaLabel: Drag to compare before and after — {title}
Projects.metaListingDescription: Selected architecture and interior projects — before and after transformations.

maklaf.title: Maklaf
maklaf.summary: Residential interior design and renovation — flow between spaces and a clean material language.
maklaf.cardBody:
The Maklaf project — a home that went through full replanning and interior design, with an emphasis on natural flow between spaces, daylight, and a refined material palette for everyday family life.

The plan connected living areas, introduced smart storage, and selected finishes and lighting that give the home a cohesive, modern, and welcoming feel.
maklaf.testimonialLead: Smart, precise planning turned the apartment into a real home —
maklaf.testimonialHighlight: connected, comfortable spaces tailored exactly to how we live.
maklaf.detailBody:
We started from a layout that did not use the home's full potential — the goal was a flowing, bright, and precise home for daily family life.

We carried out full replanning and interior design: revised zoning, tailored cabinetry and storage, and coordinated flooring, lighting, and furnishings across the living, kitchen, and private areas.

The result is a home with one clear design language — clean, warm, and functional in every corner.

maklaf-2.title: Maklaf 2
maklaf-2.summary: Continuation of a residential interior — same language, additional spaces.
maklaf-2.cardBody:
Maklaf 2 continues the original home project — completing design and planning in additional areas while keeping the same material language, details, and clean line throughout.

The focus was on precision, continuity between rooms, and storage and lighting solutions that complete the living experience.
maklaf-2.testimonialLead: Perfect continuity from the first phase —
maklaf-2.testimonialHighlight: every part of the home now feels part of the same precise design family.
maklaf-2.detailBody:
After the first Maklaf phase, we continued into additional areas of the home — with the same design principles and visual language.

The plan aligned materials, color, and lighting in the new spaces, added smart storage, and preserved flow between zones.

The result completes the home as one consistent, comfortable, and tailored whole.

shaki.title: Avner Chayishaki
shaki.summary: New-build apartment — full replanning and interior design.
shaki.cardSubtitle: Upgrade and replanning for a contractor apartment
shaki.cardBody: A project for Avner Chayishaki — a new contractor apartment that went through a full replanning and interior design process, with the aim of creating a modern, precise, and comfortable home for everyday life.
shaki.testimonialLead: Professional, precise guidance — the result matches exactly what we imagined,
shaki.testimonialHighlight: and the home feels complete and pleasant to live in.
shaki.detailBody:
We started from a new-build apartment with a basic layout — the goal was to upgrade the plan and create a coherent, tailored home for the family.

We carried out a full renovation and comprehensive replanning alongside complete interior design: selective replanning where needed, materials, lighting, and furnishings that support daily life with comfort and clarity.

The result is a home that feels personal — functional, inviting, and consistent in every room.

hulda-hanavia-4.title: Hulda Hanavia 4
hulda-hanavia-4.summary: Residential upgrade and interior design — a brighter, more precise home.
hulda-hanavia-4.cardBody:
An apartment on Hulda Hanavia Street that underwent a full upgrade — replanned layout, materials, and lighting to create a brighter, more organized, and comfortable home.

The design combined storage solutions, tailored furnishings, and a cohesive material language that makes the apartment feel spacious and inviting.
hulda-hanavia-4.testimonialLead: Professional guidance from planning through the smallest details —
hulda-hanavia-4.testimonialHighlight: the apartment feels completely renewed, precise, and comfortable to live in.
hulda-hanavia-4.detailBody:
The project began with a home that needed both planning and design upgrades — the goal was a bright, functional, and precise living space.

We adjusted the layout and selected materials, lighting, and furnishings, alongside storage that supports an organized daily routine.

The result is an apartment with a clean design line — comfortable, updated, and tailored to the residents' lifestyle.

atliz-bereshit.title: Atliz Bereshit
atliz-bereshit.summary: Butcher shop interior — product display, hygiene, and a welcoming atmosphere.
atliz-bereshit.cardSubtitle: Food retail and butcher shop interior
atliz-bereshit.cardBody:
Atliz Bereshit — a retail space planned from the ground up with an emphasis on product presentation, hygiene, customer flow, and a warm atmosphere that invites purchase.

Durable, easy-to-maintain materials, lighting that highlights the product, and a clean design line distinguish the shop and strengthen the customer experience.
atliz-bereshit.testimonialLead: The shop came out precise, welcoming, and professional —
atliz-bereshit.testimonialHighlight: customers feel the difference the moment they walk in.
atliz-bereshit.detailBody:
The project had to balance commercial function, hygiene standards, and a quality customer experience — all within one coherent design language.

We planned display, work, and service zones, precise lighting, and materials suited to a busy daily operation.

The result is a clear, clean, and inviting shop — presenting product with care and strengthening the brand.

ein-gedi-tama-38-1.title: Ein Gedi - TAMA 38-1
ein-gedi-tama-38-1.summary: TAMA 38/1 — planning and interior design for renewed apartments.
ein-gedi-tama-38-1.cardBody:
An urban renewal project on Ein Gedi Street — planning and interior design for the renewed apartments, balancing regulatory requirements, living comfort, and a contemporary architectural language.

The plan focused on efficient use of space, natural light, and materials that give the home a modern, pleasant feel.
ein-gedi-tama-38-1.testimonialHighlight: we received an updated apartment that truly fits our needs.
ein-gedi-tama-38-1.detailBody:
As part of a TAMA 38/1 project, we supported planning and interior design for the renewed apartments — aiming for a modern, functional, and comfortable home.

The plan combined regulatory requirements with real living needs: efficient layout, materials, lighting, and storage.

The result is an apartment that feels new — precise, bright, and suited to life in the upgraded building.

tzidkiyahu.title: Tzidkiyahu
tzidkiyahu.summary: Renovation and interior design — a modern kitchen and luxury bathroom.
tzidkiyahu.cardSubtitle: Kitchen and bathroom renovation and interior design
tzidkiyahu.cardBody:
A comprehensive home renovation — a modern kitchen with deep navy cabinetry, light marble countertops, integrated appliances, and layered lighting; alongside a luxury bathroom with a walk-in shower, freestanding tub, and a green-teal tiled feature wall.

The design combined full storage, clean lines, and quality materials for a bright, updated home tailored to everyday living.
tzidkiyahu.testimonialLead: The home came out precise, updated, and a pleasure to live in —
tzidkiyahu.testimonialHighlight: a kitchen and bathroom that feel like a dream come true.
tzidkiyahu.detailBody:
The project included a full renovation and interior design — with emphasis on a modern kitchen and luxury bathroom.

The kitchen features floor-to-ceiling navy cabinetry, marble surfaces, double sinks, built-in appliances, a glass display cabinet, and layered lighting. The bathroom includes a walk-in shower, freestanding tub, green-teal feature wall, and clean, spa-like materials.

The result is an updated home — functional, elegant, and comfortable for daily life.

motza.title: Motza Offices
motza.summary: Office interior design — a professional and comfortable work environment.
motza.cardBody:
Motza Offices — a modern workspace with clean lines, precise planning of seating and meeting areas, and lighting that creates a professional, comfortable environment for everyday work.

The design combined durable materials, storage solutions, and a unified language that supports the firm's image and the team's experience.
motza.testimonialLead: The office came out precise, inviting, and professional —
motza.testimonialHighlight: an environment where we work comfortably and proudly welcome clients.
motza.detailBody:
The project included planning and interior design for offices — with an emphasis on flow between work, meeting, and reception areas.

We selected materials, lighting, and furnishings that support long daily work alongside a professional, updated appearance.

The result is an organized, pleasant workspace — conveying reliability, order, and quality.

haran-18-tama-38-1.title: Haran 18 - TAMA 38-1
haran-18-tama-38-1.summary: TAMA 38/1 — planning and interior design in an urban renewal project.
haran-18-tama-38-1.cardBody:
An urban renewal project on Haran Street — planning and interior design for the renewed apartments, with an emphasis on space efficiency, lighting, and an updated living experience.

The plan delivered precise, functional, and comfortable homes — aligned with TAMA requirements and the residents' real needs.
haran-18-tama-38-1.testimonialLead: Clear, professional guidance at every stage —
haran-18-tama-38-1.testimonialHighlight: the new apartment feels tailored, modern, and comfortable for the long term.
haran-18-tama-38-1.detailBody:
As part of TAMA 38/1 on Haran Street, we supported planning and interior design for apartments after renewal — aiming for an updated, comfortable home.

The plan focused on efficient layout, materials, lighting, and storage for everyday living.

The result is an apartment that feels new — precise, bright, and suited to life in the upgraded building.

About.metaDescription: Meet Guy Tzruya — personal story, professional journey, and values in architecture and interior design.
About.heroLead: An invitation to discover the personal and professional story — from first concept to a space that feels right in every detail.
About.storyLead: I believe good architecture starts with listening — to needs, daily life, and the dream of those who live in the space.
About.storyBody:
I'm Guy Tzruya, providing architecture and interior design services. Over the years, I have guided a wide range of projects — from residential apartments to commercial spaces — with careful attention to precise planning, quality material selection, and the creation of spaces that feel natural, comfortable, and harmonious.

My approach combines deep planning thinking with interior design that serves real life: the right layout, lighting, materials, and small details that come together into a complete, refined, and pleasant space over time.
About.storyQuote: Every project begins with listening — and ends in a space that feels whole.
About.journeyLead: Key milestones along the way — from studies to end-to-end client guidance.

0.title: Where it began
0.body: Architecture and design studies — building foundations in planning, materials, and architectural detail.

2.title: Full interior design
2.body: Expanded service to complete interiors — materials, lighting, furniture, and a unified atmosphere.

3.title: Planning & licensing
3.body: Authority liaison, permits, and drawings — transparent integration of bureaucracy and design.

4.title: Guy Tzruya studio
4.body: Independent practice — architecture, interiors, and visualization — personal end-to-end guidance.

About.valuesLead: The approach behind every project — professionalism, transparency, and spaces that feel right.

Accessibility.metaDescription: Accessibility statement for Guy Tzruya website — Israeli Standard 5568, WCAG 2.0 Level AA.
Accessibility.commitmentBody: We are committed to making this website accessible to everyone, including people with disabilities. The site was built and is maintained with efforts to comply with Israeli Standard 5568, based on WCAG 2.0 Level AA.
Accessibility.standardBody: This website aims to meet Israeli Standard 5568 for web content accessibility at Level AA, implementing WCAG 2.0 principles.
Accessibility.measureMenu: Custom accessibility menu — text size, contrast, link highlighting, readable font, and motion reduction
Accessibility.measureAria: ARIA labels and relationships on interactive components
Accessibility.measureSkip: Skip to content link at the top of each page
Accessibility.measureContrast: Design that considers contrast and readability
Accessibility.browsersBody: The site was tested on current versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge.
Accessibility.coordinatorBody: For questions, feedback, and accessibility improvement requests, please contact:
Accessibility.feedbackBody: We welcome accessibility feedback. You can reach us via the contact form, email, or phone.
Accessibility.limitationsBody: Despite our efforts, some parts of the site — especially third-party content or external files — may not yet be fully accessible. We continue working to improve accessibility.
